wallets.title: Wallets
wallets.subtitle: Manage your cards and balances
wallets.noWalletsDesc: Add your first wallet to start tracking your finances
wallets.alreadyDefaultDesc: This is your active default wallet
wallets.setDefaultFirst: Set another wallet as default first
wallets.archiveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to archive "{{name}}"?

transaction.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.
transaction.sameWalletError: Source and destination must be different

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences
settings.pushPermissionDenied: Enable in device Settings to receive alerts

limits.title: Limits & Usage
limits.subtitle: Your monthly AI usage
limits.aiTransactionsDesc: Text and voice AI transaction creation
limits.freePlanDesc: Your AI features reset on the 1st of each month.
limits.limitReachedBody: You've used all your AI requests for this month.

account.title: Account
account.descriptionGuest: You are currently using a guest account
account.descriptionRegistered: Manage your personal information and security
account.saveProgressDesc: Create an account to back up your data and access it from any device. All your current data will be preserved.
account.deleteAccountDesc:
Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone.
All your data will be removed.
account.emailInvalidDesc: Please enter a valid email address
account.passwordTooShortDesc: New password must be at least 6 characters
account.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
account.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

createAccountScreen.title: Create Account
createAccountScreen.description: Link your account with email and password to access it from any device.
createAccountScreen.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

loginScreen.title: Login
loginScreen.description: Login with your existing account to restore your data.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Pin up to 10 favorites for quick access when adding transactions
categories.failedLoad: Failed to load categories. Pull to refresh.

currencies.title: Currencies
currencies.description: Choose your main currency and pin favorites for quick wallet creation
currencies.changeMainDesc: Switch from {{from}} to {{to}} as your main currency?
currencies.changeMainWarning: All converted balances and analytics will be recalculated using current exchange rates.
currencies.mainCurrencyAlert: Changing the main currency recalculates all wallet balances and analytics using current exchange rates.

onboarding.tagline: Track your expenses, manage your finances, and reach your goals.
onboarding.slide1Desc: Create transactions using text, voice, and AI.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Spendly AI turns text into transactions automatically.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Create transactions in seconds using your voice.
onboarding.slide4Desc: Visualize spending trends and financial habits.
onboarding.slide5Desc: Track money across cards, cash and savings.
onboarding.readySubtitle: Your financial workspace is ready. Start tracking your money with ease.
onboarding.chooseCategoriesDesc: Select the categories you use most often.
onboarding.selectCurrencyDesc: Choose the main currency for your wallets.
onboarding.setupWalletDesc: We'll create a default wallet for you. You can set your current balance.
onboarding.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

coach.step1: Tap here to create a transaction instantly
coach.step2: See your spending insights and trends

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If that email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now log in.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

textAI.title: Describe your transaction
textAI.subtitle: e.g. "Spent 200 UAH on groceries yesterday"
textAI.placeholder: What did you spend or earn?
textAI.errorDefault: Failed to create transaction. Please try again.

voiceAI.title: Voice Input
voiceAI.subtitle: Tap the button and describe your transaction
voiceAI.errorDefault: Failed to process voice. Please try again.
voiceAI.micDeniedDesc: Please allow microphone access in settings

offline.actionBody: This action requires an internet connection

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Your financial snapshot
insights.aiError: Failed to generate insights. Try again.

positiveCashFlow.title: Positive Cash Flow
positiveCashFlow.desc: Your income exceeded expenses by {{amount}} {{currency}} this period.

negativeCashFlow.title: Spending Exceeds Income
negativeCashFlow.desc: You spent {{amount}} {{currency}} more than you earned.

balanced.title: Nearly Break-Even
balanced.desc: Your income and expenses are almost equal this period.

savingsRateGood.title: Great Savings Rate
savingsRateGood.desc: You saved {{rate}}% of your income — keep it up!

savingsRateMedium.title: Savings Rate: {{rate}}%
savingsRateMedium.desc: You're saving a moderate portion of your income.

savingsRateLow.title: Low Savings Rate
savingsRateLow.desc: Only {{rate}}% of income saved. Try reducing discretionary spending.

topCategory.title: Top Expense: {{category}}
topCategory.desc: {{category}} made up {{pct}}% of your total expenses.

categoryConcentration.title: High Spending Concentration
categoryConcentration.desc: {{pct}}% of expenses went to {{category}}. Consider diversifying.

noActivity.title: No Activity Yet
noActivity.desc: Start adding transactions to unlock personalized insights.

activeDays.title: {{count}} Active Days
activeDays.desc: You tracked finances on {{count}} of {{total}} days this period.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDesc: We'll notify you about your spending, streaks, and weekly summaries here.
notifications.dailyCheckinBody: You haven't logged any expenses today. Take 10 seconds to stay on top of your finances.
notifications.weeklySummaryBody: The week is ending — open the app to see how you did financially.
notifications.monthlyRecapBody: Check your monthly spending recap in Analytics before the month resets.
notifications.streakBody: You've tracked your expenses {{days}} days in a row. Keep it going!
notifications.inactivityBody: You haven't tracked for {{days}} days. You might be missing expenses — catch up now.
notifications.spendingTrendBody: Your spending changed by {{pct}} compared to last week.
